pokemon:abra.name: Abra
pokemon:abra.summary: Abra needs to sleep for eighteen hours a day. If it doesn’t, this Pokémon loses its ability to use telekinetic powers. If it is attacked, Abra escapes using Teleport while it is still sleeping.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Abra needs to sleep for eighteen hours a day. If it doesn’t, this Pokémon loses its ability to use telekinetic powers. If it is attacked, Abra escapes using Teleport while it is still sleeping.
Using its psychic power is such a strain on its brain that it needs to sleep for 18 hours a day.
Using its psychic power is such a strain on its brain that it needs to sleep for 18 hours a day.
Using its ability to read minds, it will identify impending danger and TELEPORT to safety.
It hypnotizes itself so that it can teleport away when it senses danger, even if it is asleep.
It sleeps for 18 hours a day. Even when awake, it teleports itself while remaining seated.
A POKéMON that sleeps 18 hours a day. Observation revealed that it uses TELEPORT to change its location once every hour.
It sleeps for 18 hours a day. It uses a variety of extrasensory powers even while asleep.
It senses impend­ ing attacks and TELEPORTS away to safety before the actual attacks can strike.
It senses impending attacks and teleports away to safety before the actual attacks can strike.
Using its ability to read minds, it will sense impending danger and TELEPORT to safety.
Spends 18 hours of the day sleeping. Even while asleep, Abra can control its psychic powers—should danger approach, the Pokémon will simply teleport away.
Sleeps 18 hours a day. If it senses danger, it will teleport itself to safety even as it sleeps.
Sleeps 18 hours a day. If it senses danger, it will teleport itself to safety even as it sleeps.
It can teleport itself to safety while it’s asleep, but when it wakes, it doesn’t know where it is, so it panics.
Abra sleeps for eighteen hours a day. However, it can sense the presence of foes even while it is sleeping. In such a situation, this Pokémon immediately teleports to safety.
Even while asleep, it maintains a telepathic radar. It teleports when it is threatened.
Using its psychic power is such a strain on its brain that it needs to sleep for 18 hours a day.
Using its ability to read minds, it will identify impending danger and TELEPORT to safety.
ABRA sleeps for eighteen hours a day. However, it can sense the presence of foes even while it is sleeping. In such a situation, this POKéMON immediately teleports to safety.
ABRA needs to sleep for eighteen hours a day. If it doesn’t, this POKéMON loses its ability to use telekinetic powers. If it is attacked, ABRA escapes using TELEPORT while it is still sleeping.
Abra can teleport in its sleep. Apparently the more deeply Abra sleeps, the farther its teleportations go.
If it decides to TELEPORT randomly, it creates the illusion that it has created copies of itself.
If it decides to teleport randomly, it evokes the illusion that it has created copies of itself.
It sleeps 18 hours a day. Even while sleeping, it will teleport itself to treetops and pick and eat berries there.
This Pokémon uses its psychic powers while it sleeps. The contents of Abra’s dreams affect the powers that the Pokémon wields.
It can read others’ minds and will teleport away when danger approaches. You must clear your mind if you want to catch it.
It uses various psychic powers even while it’s sleeping, so you can’t tell whether or not it’s awake.
Using its psychic power is such a strain on its brain that it needs to sleep for 18 hours a day.
Using its psychic power is such a strain on its brain that it needs to sleep for 18 hours a day.
It sleeps for 18 hours a day. It uses a variety of extrasensory powers even while asleep.
It senses impending attacks and teleports away to safety before the actual attacks can strike.
Sleeps 18 hours a day. If it senses danger, it will teleport itself to safety even as it sleeps.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Abra needs to sleep for eighteen hours a day. If it doesn’t, this Pokémon loses its ability to use telekinetic powers. If it is attacked, Abra escapes using Teleport while it is still sleeping.

pokemon:kadabra.name: Kadabra
pokemon:kadabra.summary: Kadabra holds a silver spoon in its hand. The spoon is used to amplify the alpha waves in its brain. Without the spoon, the Pokémon is said to be limited to half the usual amount of its telekinetic powers.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Kadabra holds a silver spoon in its hand. The spoon is used to amplify the alpha waves in its brain. Without the spoon, the Pokémon is said to be limited to half the usual amount of its telekinetic powers.
It stares at its silver spoon to focus its mind. It emits more alpha waves while doing so.
It stares at its silver spoon to focus its mind. It emits more alpha waves while doing so.
It emits special alpha waves from its body that induce headaches just by being close by.
When it closes its eyes, twice as many alpha parti­ cles come out of the surface of its body.
If one is nearby, an eerie shadow appears on TV screens. Seeing the shadow is said to bring bad luck.
It is rumored that a boy with psychic abilities suddenly transformed into KADABRA while he was assisting research into extrasensory powers.
It happened one morning - a boy with extrasensory powers awoke in bed transformed into KADABRA.
It possesses strong spiritual power. The more danger it faces, the stronger its psychic power.
It possesses strong spiritual power. The more danger it faces, the stronger its psychic power.
It emits special alpha waves from its body that induce headaches just by being close.
There are rumors that a child with mystical powers became a Kadabra; however, this remains unverified. I suspect that the spoon Kadabra holds enhances its brain waves.
Many odd things happen if this Pokémon is close by. For example, it makes clocks run backward.
Many odd things happen if this Pokémon is close by. For example, it makes clocks run backward.
Kadabra’s presence infests televisions and monitors with creepy shadows that bring bad luck.
Kadabra emits a peculiar alpha wave if it develops a headache. Only those people with a particularly strong psyche can hope to become a Trainer of this Pokémon.
When it uses its psychic power, it emits strong ha waves that can ruin precision devices.
It stares at its silver spoon to focus its mind. It emits more alpha waves while doing so.
It emits special alpha waves from its body that induce headaches just by being close by.
KADABRA emits a peculiar alpha wave if it develops a headache. Only those people with a particularly strong psyche can hope to become a TRAINER of this POKéMON.

KADABRA holds a silver spoon in its hand. The spoon is used to amplify the alpha waves in its brain. Without the spoon, the POKéMON is said to be limited to half the usual amount of its telekinetic powers.
This Pokémon’s telekinesis is immensely powerful. To prepare for evolution, Kadabra stores up psychic energy in the star on its forehead.
If it uses its abilities, it emits special alpha waves that cause machines to malfunction.
If it uses its abilities, it emits special alpha waves that cause machines to malfunction.
A theory exists that this Pokémon was a young boy who couldn’t control his psychic powers and ended up transformed into this Pokémon.
Using its psychic power, Kadabra levitates as it sleeps. It uses its springy tail as a pillow.
It possesses strong mental capabilities, but its psychic powers are halved when it’s not holding a silver spoon.
It stares at a silver spoon to amplify its psychic powers before it lets loose. Apparently, gold spoons are no good.
It stares at its silver spoon to focus its mind. It emits more alpha waves while doing so.
It stares at its silver spoon to focus its mind. It emits more alpha waves while doing so.
When it uses its psychic power, it emits strong alpha waves that can ruin precision devices.
If it uses its abilities, it emits special alpha waves that cause machines to malfunction.
Many odd things happen if this POKéMON is close by. For example, it makes clocks run backwards.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Kadabra holds a silver spoon in its hand. The spoon is used to amplify the alpha waves in its brain. Without the spoon, the Pokémon is said to be limited to half the usual amount of its telekinetic powers.

pokemon:alakazam.name: Alakazam
pokemon:alakazam.summary: Alakazam’s brain continually grows, infinitely multiplying brain cells. This amazing brain gives this Pokémon an astoundingly high IQ of 5,000. It has a thorough memory of everything that has occurred in the world.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Alakazam’s brain continually grows, infinitely multiplying brain cells. This amazing brain gives this Pokémon an astoundingly high IQ of 5,000. It has a thorough memory of everything that has occurred in the world.
The spoons clutched in its hands are said to have been created by its psychic powers.
The spoons clutched in its hands are said to have been created by its psychic powers.
Its brain can out­ perform a super­ computer. Its intelligence quotient is said to be 5,000.
It has an IQ of 5000. It calcu­ lates many things in order to gain the edge in every battle.
Its superb memory lets it recall everything it has experienced from birth. Its IQ exceeds 5,000.
While it has strong psychic abilities and high intelligence, an ALAKAZAM’s muscles are very weak. It uses psychic power to move its body.
It does not like physical attacks very much. Instead, it freely uses extra­ sensory powers to defeat foes.
Closing both its eyes heightens all its other senses. This enables it to use its abilities to their extremes.
Closing both its eyes heightens all its other senses. This enables it to use its abilities to their extremes.
Its brain can outperform a supercomputer. Its IQ (intelligence quotient) is said to be around 5,000.
The longer Alakazam lives, the larger and heavier its head becomes. Our tests have shown that the strength of its psychic powers correlates positively to the weight of its head.
A Pokémon that can memorize anything. It never forgets what it learns—that’s why this Pokémon is smart.
A Pokémon that can memorize anything. It never forgets what it learns—that’s why this Pokémon is smart.
Its brain cells continue to increase in number until its death. The older the Alakazam, the larger its head.
Alakazam’s brain continually grows, making its head far too heavy to support with its neck. This Pokémon holds its head up using its psychokinetic power instead.
Its highly developed brain is on par with a supercomputer. It can use all forms of psychic abilities.
The spoons clutched in its hands are said to have been created by its psychic powers.
Its brain can out­ perform a super­ computer. Its intelligence quotient is said to be 5,000.
ALAKAZAM’s brain continually grows, making its head far too heavy to support with its neck. This POKéMON holds its head up using its psychokinetic power instead.

ALAKAZAM’s brain continually grows, infinitely multiplying brain cells. This amazing brain gives this POKéMON an astoundingly high IQ of 5,000. It has a thorough memory of everything that has occurred in the world.
Alakazam wields potent psychic powers. It’s said that this Pokémon used these powers to create the spoons it holds.
Its brain cells multiply continu­ ally until it dies. As a result, it remembers everything.
Its brain cells multiply continually until it dies. As a result, it remembers everything.
It is said to have an IQ of approximately 5,000. Its overflowing psychokinetic powers cause headaches to anyone nearby.
It has an incredibly high level of intelligence. Some say that Alakazam remembers everything that ever happens to it, from birth till death.
If it trusts someone deeply, it will let them have one of its spoons. Anything you eat with that spoon is apparently delicious.
Alakazam uses its psychic powers to make the spoons it carries. Each spoon is an original that there’s only one of in the whole world.
The spoons clutched in its hands are said to have been created by its psychic powers.
The spoons clutched in its hands are said to have been created by its psychic powers.
Its brain cells multiply continually until it dies. As a result, it remembers everything.
Its brain can outperform a supercomputer. Its IQ (intelligence quotient) is said to be around 5,000.
A POKéMON that can memorize anything. It never forgets what it learns-- that's why this POKéMON is smart.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Alakazam’s brain continually grows, infinitely multiplying brain cells. This amazing brain gives this Pokémon an astoundingly high IQ of 5,000. It has a thorough memory of everything that has occurred in the world.
